httpqueries.query: CREATE TABLE ht (title text, vec float_vector knn_type='hnsw' hnsw_similarity='L2' model_name='sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2' from='title')
CREATE TABLE hj (title text, vec float_vector knn_type='hnsw' hnsw_similarity='L2' model_name='sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2' from='title')
